speaker: MENTEITH
text: The English power is near, led on by Malcolm,

speaker: MENTEITH
text: His uncle Siward, and the good Macduff.

speaker: MENTEITH
text: Revenges burn in them, for their dear causes

speaker: MENTEITH
text: Would to the bleeding and the grim alarm

speaker: MENTEITH
text: Excite the mortified man.

speaker: ANGUS
text: Near Birnam Wood

speaker: ANGUS
text: Shall we well meet them. That way are they coming.

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Who knows if Donalbain be with his brother?

speaker: LENNOX
text: For certain, sir, he is not. I have a file

speaker: LENNOX
text: Of all the gentry. There is Siward’s son

speaker: LENNOX
text: And many unrough youths that even now

speaker: LENNOX
text: Protest their first of manhood.

speaker: MENTEITH
text: What does the tyrant?

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Great Dunsinane he strongly fortifies.

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Some say he’s mad; others that lesser hate him

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Do call it valiant fury. But for certain

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: He cannot buckle his distempered cause

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Within the belt of rule.

speaker: ANGUS
text: Now does he feel

speaker: ANGUS
text: His secret murders sticking on his hands.

speaker: ANGUS
text: Now minutely revolts upbraid his faith-breach.

speaker: ANGUS
text: Those he commands move only in command,

speaker: ANGUS
text: Nothing in love. Now does he feel his title

speaker: ANGUS
text: Hang loose about him, like a giant’s robe

speaker: ANGUS
text: Upon a dwarfish thief.

speaker: MENTEITH
text: Who, then, shall blame

speaker: MENTEITH
text: His pestered senses to recoil and start

speaker: MENTEITH
text: When all that is within him does condemn

speaker: MENTEITH
text: Itself for being there?

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Well, march we on

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: To give obedience where ’tis truly owed.

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Meet we the med’cine of the sickly weal,

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: And with him pour we in our country’s purge

speaker: CAITHNESS
text: Each drop of us.

speaker: LENNOX
text: Or so much as it needs

speaker: LENNOX
text: To dew the sovereign flower and drown the weeds.

speaker: LENNOX
text: Make we our march towards Birnam.
